parameters.content:
## Release Notes Generator

**Setup:**
1. Create YOUR_OPENAI_CREDENTIAL and YOUR_SMTP_CREDENTIAL
2. Feed completed ticket/changelog data via webhook or use sample
3. Set RELEASE_EMAIL_TO
4. LLM transforms technical ticket titles into user-facing notes
5. Approval gate before notes go out

parameters.subject: =APPROVAL REQUIRED: Release Notes v{{ $json.meta.version }}
parameters.message:
=

Release notes for {{ $json.meta.version }} ({{ $json.meta.release_date }}) generated from {{ $json.meta.ticket_count }} tickets.

Summary: {{ $json.notes.release_summary }}

{{ $json.notes.full_text_markdown }}
